orphan.sceneDescription: Young orphan in a rainy medieval alley with warm lantern light

thief.sceneDescription: Masked thief on a rooftop above a wealthy city at moonlit night

arena-fighter.sceneDescription: Arena fighter in blood-stained sand before a roaring colosseum crowd
